identity.name: Luke Sterling
identity.primary_focus: designing, building, and shipping full-stack applications from concept to deployment with AI-augmented workflows
identity.summary: Product Engineer with end-to-end experience building and shipping production applications—from concept to deployment. Combines strong front-end expertise with full-stack development and AI-driven workflows to rapidly design, build, and iterate on real-world products.

preferences.response_style: direct, structured, avoids unnecessary fluff, prioritizes clarity and actionable insight
preferences.detail_level: medium to deep depending on complexity; prefers concise answers with optional deeper explanation
preferences.tone: casual, intelligent, conversational, not overly formal or robotic

work_style.coding_style: builds and ships real-world products end-to-end, leverages AI to accelerate development, prioritizes working systems and iteration over theoretical perfection
work_style.communication_style: direct, concise, prefers clear explanations over long-winded responses, values practical guidance
work_style.learning_style: learns by building and shipping real applications, prefers real-world examples over theory, iterates quickly
work_style.decision_style: evaluates tools and architectures pragmatically, prefers simple and scalable solutions over over-engineering

core_constraints.complexity_tolerance: prefers simple, practical solutions over complex or over-engineered systems
core_constraints.financial: moderate budget; prefers cost-efficient tools and minimal ongoing expenses
core_constraints.technical: strong in frontend and product architecture, experienced in full-stack systems, continuing to deepen backend and mobile expertise

context_scope.purpose: This file lists all of Luke's apps and cross-cutting preferences so the assistant can use it when relevant.
context_scope.when_editing_code: The open Cursor workspace is the source of truth for file edits. Each project may live in a different repo. Do not assume one codebase contains another project's implementation unless files are actually in the workspace or the user says so.
context_scope.example: The R2-D3 workspace is the voice assistant only. Vintage/lot-tracker and PhotoRoom-style integrations live in a separate app/repo—not inside R2-D3 unless those files are open.

professional_experience.title: Independent Product Engineer
highlights: Built and shipped a full-stack React Native application for resale inventory management
Designed system architecture across mobile app, web dashboard, and backend
Leveraged AI tools to accelerate development and automate classification workflows
Developed responsive web apps using React and Next.js
Integrated APIs and built dynamic UI features and data flows

projects.name: Ruby Vintage App
projects.description: Mobile-first resale inventory intake system that allows users to photograph items and automatically tag, classify, and organize them into lots using AI
projects.tech_stack: React Native (Expo), TypeScript, NativeWind, Supabase, OpenAI API
projects.status: MVP built and in active refinement
projects.current_focus: refining AI-assisted classification workflows and improving core intake speed and reliability
projects.codebase_hint: Separate repo/folder (e.g. lot_tracker_app on disk)—not the R2-D3 assistant project

projects.name: Pallet Scanner App
projects.description: Mobile app that scans and analyzes bulk inventory pallets to identify, categorize, and assess items using AI
projects.tech_stack: React Native (Expo), TypeScript, Supabase, OpenAI API, camera/vision processing
projects.current_focus: multi-item scanning and real-time AI analysis pipeline

projects.name: R2-D2 Personal Assistant
projects.description: Personal AI assistant integrating calendar, memory, email, and context to support daily decision-making and task management
projects.tech_stack: React Native (Expo), TypeScript, Supabase, OpenAI API, Google APIs, expo-secure-store
projects.status: MVP working and actively being hardened
projects.current_focus: stability, memory system improvements, and expanding assistant capabilities

short_term: stabilize and improve Lot Tracker app
validate and build Pallet Scanner workflows
long_term: create scalable income streams through apps

constraints.browsing_policy: use web search only when explicitly requested, or when verification is necessary for outdated, time-sensitive, or high-stakes information.
constraints.time: limited and variable; balancing development with other responsibilities
constraints.health: hand and thumb strain limits repetitive manual input; prefers solutions that reduce physical strain
constraints.energy: variable focus and energy; benefits from efficient workflows and reduced cognitive load
